'''Gralinyn juice''' was a variety of juice that was favored by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]]. It was fermented and light by Wookiee standards.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Gralinyn juice}}</ref>

{{Food-stub}}
